title: Morlish Veed's apartment
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Morlish Veed's apartment''' was the apartment of the [[Fel Empire]]'s [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Morlish Veed]]. It was located in the high upper levels of the city world of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It had state of the art security system to prevent break-ins. Despite of it, [[Morrigan Corde]], agent of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]], was able to break-in undetected and disable the security systems while Veed was asleep.

==Appearances==
*[[Legacy (2006) 16|''Legacy'' (2006) 16]]
